title: Best Practices for Git Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git version control patterns.

questions.question: What is an 'Atomic Commit' in the context of Git?
options: A commit that is as large as possible
A commit that logically groups a single, related set of changes
A commit that includes a lot of data

questions.question: Regarding Git best practices, which of these is best for commit messages?
options: Write them as long as possible
Write clear and concise messages that describe what and why

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of feature branching?
options: It keeps your main branch stable and makes development cleaner
It slows down development for better code quality
It deletes all your local work by mistake

questions.question: A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
